headline: Arizona's Crackdown On Kalshi Halted As Federal Court Sides With CFTC In Fight Over Election Betting And Prediction Markets
summary: On Friday, a federal judge temporarily blocked Arizona's criminal case against Kalshi, siding with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission.
